content:
MODULE: cosmos.mcp_server.server
FILE: cosmos/mcp_server/server.py (1765 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp_server

DESCRIPTION: cosmos MCP Server - Claude Code Integration

Provides tools and resources for Claude Code:
- Memory tools (remember, recall)
- Agent delegation tools
- Evolution feedback tools
- Streaming resources

CLASSES:
- cosmosMCPServer: MCP Server providing cosmos capabilities to Claude Code.

Tools:
- cosmos_rememb
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def remember(self, content: str, tags: Optional[list[str]]=None, importance: float=0.5) -> dic
  Methods: async def recall(self, query: str, limit: int=5, search_archival: bool=True, search_conversation: bo
  Methods: async def delegate(self, task: str, agent_type: str='auto', context: Optional[dict]=None) -> dict
  Methods: async def evolve(self, feedback: str, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> dict
  Methods: async def status(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def vision_analyze(self, image: str, task: str='caption') -> dict
  Methods: async def browse(self, goal: str, url: Optional[str]=None) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_mcp_server() -> Server
- async def run_server()
- def main()
